prose:
**Frontier‐orbital gap of formaldehyde** — DFT single‐point (`DFT//DFT`) at B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier `standard`), no density fitting, in PySCF (v internal)  
Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz` (no re-optimization). SCF converged in 8 cycles.  
HOMO = –7.6523067 eV; LUMO = –1.7826355 eV → gap = **5.8696712 eV**.  
No warnings reported.  
Reproducibility:  
• Command:  
  `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz --method dft --tier standard --accept-defaults --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmppuu2joga/live.json`  
• Output JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmppuu2joga/live.json`  
• Live log (SCF/opt details): written to `frontier_<timestamp>.out` in the working directory (you can `tail -f` it).  
integrity.trustworthy: true
